---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new idea or improvement
title: '[FEATURE] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## 💡 Feature Description

What do you want to add or improve?

## 🎯 Problem It Solves

Who benefits? Example: "Students who write in Hindi cannot use the system."

## 🛠️ Proposed Solution

Which file(s) would change? Rough implementation idea?

## 📊 Priority

- [ ] Critical (blocks real usage)
- [ ] High (significant improvement)
- [ ] Medium (nice to have)
- [ ] Low (minor polish)

## 📝 Additional Context

Links, mockups, or examples from other similar systems.
